name: libdatetime-timezone-perl
title: libdatetime-timezone-perl
summary: framework exposing the Olson time zone database to Perl
description:
framework exposing the Olson time zone database to Perl
DateTime::TimeZone is a Perl module framework providing an interface to the
Olson time zone database. It exposes the database as a set of modules, one
for each time zone defined, allowing for various optimizations in doing time
zone calculations.
.
The Olson time zone database is the best available source for worldwide time
zone information and is available from <URL:ftp://ftp.iana.org/tz/releases/>.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdatetime-timezone-perl because framework exposing the Olson time zone database to Perl.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdatetime-timezone-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdatetime-timezone-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdatetime-timezone-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
